title: French Vanilla
description: A performance focused modpack with QOL and variety in mind.
body:
![French Vanilla Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80d93d6a82d19169e6a8a0ae331041d3eb95bc29_0.webp)

### Overview
**French Vanilla** is a vanilla-friendly modpack which aims to get the best performance possible while adding a bit of variety to your world. 

### Variety
Included is a handful of resourcepacks and mods which together add hundreds of new structures and structure variations for you to discover covering all 3 dimension - overworld, nether and the end. All of the structures use vanilla blocks and items with no modded blocks or items being added to the game.

### Performance
All the mods which have become a staple of performance in the modding community are present including the likes of **Sodium** and **Ferrite Core** along with just about every other compatible performance mod spanning networking, rendering, and memory optimization.

### QOL
Minecraft can be click intensive and monotonous at times. This modpack aims to improve your experience by respecting your time in the form of mods like **Tree Harvester** and **Vein Miner** two very simple mods which alone will save you hours of gameplay staring at your screen. Many other smaller tweaks are included such as **Crafting Tweaks**, **Inventory Sorting** and **Journey Map**.
